requirement_topic.en: Power-tool electrical safety basis and SABER filing route
requirement_topic.zh: 电动工具电气安全基线与SABER报备路径
requirement_topic.zht: 電動工具電氣安全基線與SABER報備路徑

summary.en: For in-scope power tools, Saudi importers must align with SASO technical regulations that adopt IEC safety requirements for hand-held, portable, or transportable tools, and route conformity through SABER as a precondition for market entry. The practical filing chain is an importer-led model declaration, conformity testing evidence, then PCoC, and in many cases a per-shipment SCoC.
summary.zh: 对于范围内电动工具，沙特进口商必须按SASO采用的适用IEC要求（手持、便携或可搬运工具安全要求）进行符合性认定，并通过SABER走入市流程。实践链路通常为进口商主导的型号申报、测试证明、再取得PCoC并在部分情形下取得每批SCoC。
summary.zht: 對於範圍內電動工具，沙特進口商必須依據SASO採用的適用IEC要求（手持、便攜或可搬運工具安全要求）進行符合性認定，並透過SABER走入市流程。實務流程通常為進口商主導的型號申報、測試證明、再取得PCoC並在部分情形下取得每批SCoC。

standards_or_laws: SASO technical regulations for in-scope electrical products adopting IEC 62841 safety requirements
SABER Product Certificate of Conformity process for regulated products
SASO IECEE conformity service and national-difference application for electrical test reports

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers commonly provide CCC-based electrical safety evidence and CNAS-backed lab tests against domestic GB/GB/T references for the same tool family. These are mandatory or contractual within China but do not create a one-to-one equivalence for Saudi model-level SABER filing.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常会提供CCC电气安全证据以及基于国内GB/GB/T标准体系的CNAS背书检测报告，覆盖同一机型族。该类证据在中国属于强制或出厂合规要求，但不足以与沙特的进口型号级SABER报备形成一一对应替代。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常會提供CCC電氣安全證據以及基於中國GB/GB/T標準體系的CNAS背書檢測報告，覆蓋同一機型族。該類證據在中國屬於強制或出廠合規要求，但不足以與沙特的進口機型級SABER報備形成一一對應替代。

standards_or_laws: CCC compliance for covered electrical categories in China
Domestic GB / GB/T electrical safety documentation and CNAS/NIMCB lab reports for model design

gap.en: Exporters face a refile-and-retest gap when converting Chinese domestic files into Saudi route files. The importer in Saudi must hold the model registration and test mapping, and reports signed for Chinese domestic conditions are often incomplete for SASO-adopted requirements, Saudi labeling, and national-difference clauses.
gap.zh: 出口商面临的差距在于需将中国国内文件转为沙特入场文件。沙特境内进口商必须持有型号注册与测试映射能力，国内条件下签发的报告常无法直接覆盖SASO采用要求、标识要求及国家差异条款。
gap.zht: 出口商面臨的差距在於須將中國國內文件轉為沙特入場文件。沙特境內進口商必須持有機型註冊與測試映射能力，國內條件下簽發的報告常無法直接涵蓋SASO採用要求、標示要求及國家差異條款。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope products where SASO technical regulations apply through SABER
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable Chinese product classes, but not sufficient for Saudi entry without SABER alignment

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat SASO electrical safety as Saudi-specific because model-level evidence in SABER must be built from Saudi-accepted test documentation and importer registration, not merely by reusing Chinese CCC paperwork.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将SASO电气安全按沙特专属要求处理，因为SABER下的型号级证据必须建立于沙特认可的测试文件和进口商注册，而不能仅复用中国CCC资料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將SASO電氣安全按沙特專屬要求處理，因為SABER下的機型級證據必須建立於沙特認可的測試文件與進口商註冊，而不能僅復用中國CCC資料。
